errors.message: The plural noun 'components' should be used here as the context implies multiple items.
errors.context: build responsive and and and reusable UI component

errors.message: Subject-verb agreement error. 'I' requires 'have worked' instead of 'have work'.
errors.context: I have work work with CSS boot strap

errors.message: The singular noun 'project' should be pluralized as 'projects' to match 'one of my'.
errors.context: in one of my previous project we had

errors.message: The verb should be in the past tense 'caused' to match the narrative timeline.
errors.context: changed the process noticeable UI UI lag

errors.message: The past tense 'was' is required to report a completed action.
errors.context: the parent component was updated updating a small piece of state

errors.message: The verb 're-render' is transitive here; use 'were being re-rendered' or 'were re-rendering'.
The infinitive 'to avoid' requires the base form of the verb 'recreating'.
errors.context: to avoid recreate function on every render

errors.message: The noun phrase should be 'the UI' for clarity.
The noun phrase 'large bundle size' is more idiomatic than 'large bundle of size'.
errors.context: issue is large bundle of size and all

errors.message: The phrase should be 'high bundle size' or 'large bundle size'.
errors.context: show first print and high bundle of size actually

errors.message: The term should be 'status codes' rather than 'static codes'.
